SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.crypto.gpg

Class JkGpgSigner

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.crypto.gpg.JkGpgSigner
All Implemented Interfaces:
JkFileSigner, JkSigner
public final class JkGpgSigner extends Object implements JkSigner
Provides methods for signing data with GnuPG.

  • Method Details

    • ofSecretRing

      public static JkGpgSigner ofSecretRing(Path secRing, String passphrase, String keyName)
      Creates a new instance of JkGpgSigner with the specified secret ring, passphrase, and key name.
      Parameters:
      secRing - the path to the secret ring file
      passphrase - the passphrase for the secret ring file
      keyName - the name of the key to use within the secret ring file. Can be empty if secRing contains a single key.
      Returns:
      a new instance of JkGpg

    • ofSecretRing

      public static JkGpgSigner ofSecretRing(Path secRing, String password)
      Creates a JkGpgSigner with the specified secret key ring, assuming the secret ring contains a single key.

    • ofAsciiKey

      public static JkGpgSigner ofAsciiKey(String asciiKey, String passphrase)
      Creates a new instance of JkGpgSigner with the specified ascii key and passphrase.
      Parameters:
      asciiKey - The armored key to use for signing. It is generally by exporting key in asc format
      passphrase - The passphrase for the armored key. The exported key is protected by a passphrase. This is the passphrase to use for decoding the armored key.

    • ofStandardProject

      public static JkGpgSigner ofStandardProject(Path baseDir)
      Creates a JkGpgSigner instance for a standard project.

      This method creates a JkGpgSigner instance using the specified base directory to locate the public and secret ring files. If the public or secret ring files are not found in the base directory, the default files will be used.

      Parameters:
      baseDir - the base directory of the project
      Returns:
      a JkGpgSigner instance for the standard project

    • ofStandardProperties

      public static JkGpgSigner ofStandardProperties()
      Creates a new instance of JkGpgSigner with the standard properties.
      Use jeka.gpg.secret-key property or JEKA_GPG_SECRET_KEY for passing private ascii key.
      Use jeka.gpg.passphrase property or JEKA_GPG_PASSPHRASE for passing key password
      Returns:
      a new instance of JkGpgSigner

    • ofDefaultGnuPg

      public static JkGpgSigner ofDefaultGnuPg(String password, String keyName)
      Creates a JkGpgSigner with default GnuPgp file location.
      Parameters:
      keyName - Can be empty if secret ring contains a single key.

    • getDefaultGpgSecretRingPath

      public static Path getDefaultGpgSecretRingPath()
      Returns the default path for the secret ring file.

    • getSecretRingPath

      public Path getSecretRingPath()
      Returns the secret ring of this object.

    • sign

      public void sign(InputStream streamToSign, OutputStream signatureStream)
      Description copied from interface: JkSigner
      Signs the data in the specified input stream and writes the signature to the output stream.
      Specified by:
      sign in interface JkSigner
      Parameters:
      streamToSign - the input stream containing the data to be signed
      signatureStream - the output stream to write the signature string to

    • toString
